name: Creamed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice onions.
2. Add onions to boiling water.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes until onions are tender.
4. In another saucepan over medium heat, melt butter.
5. Stir in flour until smooth.
6. Slowly add milk.
7. Add salt to taste.
8. Stir until thickened.
9. Drain onions and add to sauce.
